title: APM: CSRF Token Missing on State-Changing Request
description: Detects HTTP POST/PUT/DELETE requests to state-changing endpoints lacking proper Referer or Origin headers, indicating potential Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks captured by APM.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'HTTP Method' in ('POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH') and 'security.attack.type' = 'csrf' | stats count as Violations by 'HTTP URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'service.name' | sort -Violations
